notes_zh:
- **新增** 快捷面板中按 ⌘, 直接打开设置
- **新增** 统一命令面板，主窗口和快捷面板均可使用 ⌘K 呼出
- **新增** 快捷面板记忆位置，跟随鼠标所在屏幕打开，支持多屏幕
- **新增** 快捷面板拖拽吸附（居中/推荐位置），带触觉反馈
- **新增** 主窗口搜索支持匹配链接标题
- **优化** 全新状态栏图标，与应用图标风格统一
- **优化** 粘贴速度大幅提升
- **优化** 接力模式图标和交互体验
- **修复** 剪贴板历史被意外删除的问题（永久保存现在正确生效）
- **修复** 快捷面板键盘导航时列表不跟随滚动
- **修复** 快捷面板拖拽后吸附线未消失
- **修复** 文件路径误检测问题
- **修复** 磁力链接被误判为敏感内容
- **修复** 备份时间显示为具体日期
- **修复** 接力模式弹窗可能无法显示在前台
notes_en:
- **New** Press ⌘, in quick panel to open settings
- **New** Unified command palette for both main window and quick panel (⌘K)
- **New** Quick panel remembers position per screen, follows mouse, multi-monitor support
- **New** Quick panel drag snapping (center/recommended) with haptic feedback
- **New** Main window search matches link titles
- **Improve** Redesigned menu bar icon matching app icon style
- **Improve** Much faster paste speed
- **Improve** Relay mode icons and UX
- **Fix** Clipboard history being unexpectedly deleted (permanent retention now works)
- **Fix** Quick panel list not scrolling to selected item on keyboard navigation
- **Fix** Snap guide lines not disappearing after drag
- **Fix** File path detection false positives
- **Fix** Magnet links falsely detected as sensitive content
- **Fix** Backup schedule shows date+time instead of relative text
- **Fix** Relay mode alert may not appear in foreground
